body_txt: This is when shock value meets Rule of Funny . Normally, when we see such shocking stuff, we cover our eyes in disgust. However, when used right, it gains a humorous shading to it. Whether it gets a laugh depends on the audience and how it's done. When done right, it's hilarious. When done wrong, it just offends the audience . It all goes back to the execution, Tropes Are Tools , after all. But some people just don't enjoy this type of comedy no matter how well it's done, and may as a result consider all vulgar humor inherently low effort. Tropes that often, but not always, fall under this: Compare Crosses the Line Twice . See Bottom of the Barrel Joke for when this is an excuse for lazy writing.
